features.name: probe definition to intermediate wire with read
features.description: Code should include a probe() expression assigned to an intermediate wire, then read() of that wire used in a connect statement
features.snippet:
wire w : Probe<UInt<1>>
define w = probe(in)
connect out, read(w)

features.name: direct read of probe without intermediate wire
features.description: Code should include a direct read(probe()) expression in a connect statement without intermediate wire

features.name: probe type wire with define assignment
features.description: Code should include a wire of Probe type assigned via define statement rather than connect
features.snippet:
wire w : Probe<UInt<1>>
define w = probe(in)
